note: smart_delegate returns task() command string but doesn't execute it — creates a two-step delegation flow (approve → then call task() separately) that adds latency
expected: smart_delegate should spawn the agent directly
actual: Returns an 'execute' command string with hint to call task() separately

note: task_board shows empty fleet — subagents launched via task() don't emit heartbeats so the board can't track them
expected: task_board should show all running subagents with phase/status
actual: Shows "0 running, 0 done, 0 failed" even when 6 cartographers and architects are active
